home.about.title: Who We Are
home.about.subtitle: Where Heritage Meets Innovation
home.about.desc: Calligro is the world's leading digital academy dedicated to Arabic calligraphy, blending traditional mastery with cutting-edge interactive learning technology.
home.about.vision_desc: To be the digital bridge connecting the greatness of the past with the future of generations, keeping Arabic calligraphy alive and vibrant everywhere.
home.about.mission_desc: Providing an exceptional learning experience that empowers students to master calligraphy under the guidance of elite world-renowned calligraphers.
home.about.feature1.title: Interactive Learning
home.about.feature1.desc: Live sessions and precise technical feedback ensuring rapid development.
home.about.feature2.title: Global Masters
home.about.feature2.desc: Learn from calligraphers with official traditional certifications and international acclaim.
home.about.feature3.title: Flexible Access
home.about.feature3.desc: Learn anytime, anywhere through our advanced mobile and web applications.
about.page.title: Our Story
about.page.subtitle: From an Ambitious Idea to a Global Art Academy
about.ceo.title: Founder's Profile
about.ceo.name: Yazan Qattous
about.ceo.bio: A Software Engineer graduated from Princess Sumaya University of Technology (PSUT). With extensive experience in developing mobile apps and complex software systems, Yazan spearheaded the development of Calligro to become the ultimate destination for Arabic calligraphy enthusiasts, focusing on robust payment architectures and an unparalleled user experience.
about.roadmap.title: Our Vision
about.roadmap.step1.title: Digital Foundation
about.roadmap.step1.desc: Building state-of-the-art infrastructure and advanced mobile/web apps.
about.roadmap.step2.title: Global Expansion
about.roadmap.step2.desc: Onboarding elite calligraphers from all continents and multiple languages.
about.roadmap.step3.title: AI Integration
about.roadmap.step3.desc: Integrating AI technology for automated script analysis and correction.
about.roadmap.step4.title: Full Ecosystem
about.roadmap.step4.desc: Launching a complete art marketplace for buying and selling masterworks.

about.vision.title: Crafting the Digital Legacy
about.features.multi_project_desc: Managing diverse technology stacks from mobile apps to robust web platforms.
about.features.secure_payments_desc: Implementing global transaction architectures for seamless user enrollment.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.section1.title: 1. Data Collection
privacy.section1.content: At Calligro, we value your privacy. We collect minimal data required to provide our services and ensure a secure learning environment. This includes: Account Information (Email, Name, Profile Picture via Google/Apple Sign-In), Device Information for security, and Usage Data such as course progress and quiz results.
privacy.section2.title: 2. Payment Security
privacy.section2.content: Your financial security is our priority. We do not store credit card details on our servers. All web payments are processed securely by Lemon Squeezy, which acts as our Merchant of Record. Mobile payments are handled directly by Apple and Google. These providers utilize industry-standard encryption to protect your data.
privacy.section3.title: 3. Service Providers
privacy.section3.content: We utilize the following trusted third-party services to power Calligro Academy:
privacy.firebase.title: Firebase
privacy.firebase.content: Authentication, Database, and Cloud Function hosting.
privacy.jitsi.title: Jitsi
privacy.jitsi.content: Secure video streaming for live masterclass sessions.
privacy.section4.title: 4. Your Data Rights
privacy.section4.content: Under global privacy standards, you have the right to access, export, correct, or request the deletion of your personal data at any time. You can manage most of these settings directly through your Account Profile inside the Calligro app or portal.
terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.section1.title: 1. Introduction, Acceptance of Terms, and Definitions
terms.section1.content:
Acceptance: Welcome to Calligro. By using the app or creating an account, you acknowledge your full and legal agreement to these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree to any clause, please stop using the app immediately.
Definitions:
App: The Calligro digital platform.
User: Anyone who uses the app or creates an account.
Student: A user who enrolls in educational courses.
Teacher: A user who offers educational or artistic courses or services.
Content: All materials published within the app (texts, images, videos, assignments, artworks).
terms.section2.title: 2. Account Creation and Management
terms.section2.content:
The student is obligated to provide correct, accurate, and updated personal information when creating the account.
The student bears full responsibility for maintaining the confidentiality of their login data and everything that is issued from their account.
The student has the right to request the deletion of their account at any time. In return, Calligro administration has the right to suspend or delete any account in the event of suspected illegal use, misuse of the platform, or violation of these terms.
terms.section3.title: 3. Registration for Courses and Educational Sessions
terms.section3.content:
The student has the right to register for the offered courses, attend sessions, and submit required assignments.
Session times are displayed automatically according to the student's geographic time zone.
terms.section4.title: 4. Payments and Refund Policy
terms.section4.content:
Payments for courses are made by students in advance via approved and secure payment methods within the app.
Refunds: The student has the right to request a refund of the amount paid only before the start of the first session of the course in the event of convincing reasons.
Forfeiture of the right to refund: After the course starts, the student is not entitled to claim any financial refund, whether they attended the sessions or not.
Accepted refund requests are processed according to the payment mechanism used and within the time period specified by payment service providers (banks or payment gateways).
Calligro reserves the right to refuse any refund request in the event of suspected manipulation or misuse of this policy.
terms.section5.title: 5. Intellectual Property and Copyright
terms.section5.content:
The student grants the Calligro app a non-exclusive license to display the content they may share (such as assignments) within the app.
The student is prohibited from republishing, recording, copying, or sharing any educational content outside the platform or sending it to third parties without the explicit written permission of the teacher who owns the content. Any violation exposes the student to legal accountability.
terms.section6.title: 6. Behavior, Community, and Ratings
terms.section6.content:
Community Rules: Publishing any offensive, immoral, or illegal content is prohibited. Promoting services or platforms outside Calligro without prior permission is prohibited. The administration has the right to delete any violating post or comment without notice.
Ratings: The student is allowed to rate the teacher after completing the course or fulfilling the attendance and submission conditions.
terms.section7.title: 7. Translation and Disclaimer
terms.section7.content:
Translation: Some content may be translated automatically depending on the app language. Calligro bears no responsibility for any errors resulting from machine translation.
Disclaimer: The Calligro platform is an intermediary platform; it bears no responsibility for any direct dispute that may arise between the student and the teacher. Your use of the app and reliance on its content is entirely at your own personal responsibility.
terms.section8.title: 8. Amendments to Terms
terms.section8.content:
Calligro administration retains the absolute right to amend these terms at any time.
Users will be notified of any material amendment. Your continued use of the app after this notification constitutes an explicit and binding agreement to the new amendments.
